title: Blocky
description: Add new stone type and block variations for it
body:
This mod adds new type of stone - crystallite that generates in world alongside diorite,andesite and granite. Also mod adds block variations for crystallite.

![Crystallite blocks and few amethyst blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4ace4c397dc55b7df0e1178048ff69b732f58d3a.png)

- Forge port?
> No, I want to concentrate on creating and maintaining bigger projects

- 1.20.X port?
> No, I don't have time for this


### If you have any questions or suggestions DM me on Discord - gitgilev
